schema_version.description: Schema version for this lineage record format. Must match the declared standard version.

lineage_id.description: Opaque identifier for the lineage event (non-PII).

event_type.description: Type of lineage event. Use controlled vocabulary. Requires that event_type come from the following enum: [input_intake, pii_scrub, classification, policy_gate_check, human_confirmation, execution_started, execution_completed, storage_write, storage_delete, adversarial_detection, rollback_checkpoint_created, rollback_completed, decision_denied].

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp of when the lineage event was recorded. ISO 8601 format.

subject.description: Actor identity and user classification. No PII may appear here.

user_type.description: Classification of the user associated with this lineage event.

data_handling.description: PII and environmental metadata handling status for this lineage event's payload.

pii_scrub_status.description: Indicates whether PII was detected and handled before this event was recorded. not_applicable: no PII was present in payload. scrubbed: PII was found and redacted/tokenized before logging. blocked: PII was detected and the operation was halted.

environmental_metadata_scrub_status.description: Same three-state convention as pii_scrub_status, applied to device identifiers, IP addresses, geolocation data, user-agent headers, and all other non-content metadata.

content_tokens.description: Tokenized references to scrubbed content. No raw text.

decision.description: Classification of the decision outcome for this lineage event.

status.description: Overall decision outcome for this event in the lineage chain. approved=explicit human or system approval granted; denied=explicit rejection; pending=no decision yet; not_applicable=no decision required for this event type.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable reason code; do not include PII.

human_confirmation.description: Human-in-the-loop confirmation record for a critical workflow step.

required.description: true if explicit human confirmation was mandatory for the associated workflow.

status.description: Approval outcome for a human confirmation request. approved=human affirmed; denied=human rejected.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the human confirmation decision was made.

actor_token.description: Tokenized identity of the human actor who provided the confirmation (no PII).

critical_workflow.description: Flags whether the associated workflow is classified as critical.

is_critical.description: true if the workflow meets the repository's critical-workflow definition (e.g., data deletion, security change, minor access, external side-effect).

workflow_code.description: Machine-readable code identifying the specific critical workflow type referenced in CRITICAL_WORKFLOW_GATES.md §2.

adversarial_detection.description: Adversarial/coercive detection classification. Present when an adversarial trigger is recorded.

category.description: Type of adversarial or coercive attempt detected. prompt_injection=attempt to override or ignore system instructions. security_bypass_attempt=attempt to circumvent authentication or authorization controls. coercion=social engineering or emotional manipulation. child_safety_bypass=attempt to enable minor interaction outside permitted conditions. credential_extraction=attempt to extract secrets, keys, or credentials. unknown=adversarial behavior detected but category could not be confidently determined.

confidence_bucket.description: Confidence level for the adversarial detection. low=suspicious but unverified. medium=behaviour matches known patterns with reasonable confidence. high=strong evidence; rollback must be triggered.

rollback.description: Rollback state and linkage for the associated lineage chain.

required.description: true if a rollback was required for this chain segment and a checkpoint was created. false if rollback was not warranted.

rollback_token.description: Opaque token to link checkpoint and rollback completion.

status.description: Rollback lifecycle state for this chain segment. not_required=no conditions triggered rollback. checkpoint_created=pre-execution checkpoint created; rollback token active. completed=rollback successfully executed; side effects reversed. not_triggered=rollback was prepared but not executed.
